message:
🐛 Add input validation for helm/kubectl command parameters (#2424)

Adds validateK8sName(), validateHelmChart(), and validateHelmVersion()
to reject flag-injection attacks (e.g. --kubeconfig=...) and shell
metacharacters in user-supplied cluster, namespace, release, and chart
parameters before they are passed to exec.Command.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
